title: Just Needed
description: Everything that's just needed in Minecraft
body:
# Just Needed

This mod aims to improve the vanilla experience without overloading it too much with small tweaks and simple features. Most of the features are adding variants of existing vanilla blocks like wool stairs or wool, adding new recipes or stopping crops from being trampled if you're wearing boots with feather falling!
 

# Features

- Wool, sand, dirt, gravel, glowstone stairs/slabs!
- Pumpkin soup and cooked eggs!
- Recipes for items that should be craftable!
- More fuels for your furnace!
- If a piglin kills a ghast it will drop the pigstep disc!
- Stop crop trampling while wearing feather falling or in creative
 

# Social Media

Twitter: @ImJustDoom

Discord Group: https://discord.gg/bYwESVg

 

# FAQ

Q: Will you support previous versions?

A: No, the code has changed a lot and it would be hard for me to maintain all versions. You can to create this mod for 1.13 and earlier if you'd like, just give me credit and have a link to either me or this mod page explaining its the original and I'll link the mod on this page.

 

Q: Can I use this in my modpack?

A: Yes you may

 

Q: I have a suggestion but how do I tell you?
A: You can submit suggestions here!
